title: Golem CLI Command Output
description: Structured output documents emitted by golem-cli data output formats. Every document is identified by its top-level $type field.

account.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account delete`.

account.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account get`.

account.new.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account new`.

account.permission-share.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account permission-share delete`.

account.permission-share.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account permission-share get`.

account.permission-share.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account permission-share list`.

account.permission-share.new.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account permission-share new`.

account.permission-share.update.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account permission-share update`.

account.update.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem account update`.

agent-type.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent-type get`.

agent-type.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent-type list`.

agent.cancel-invocation.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent cancel-invocation`.

agent.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent delete`.

agent.file-contents.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent file-contents`.

agent.files.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent files`.

agent.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent get`.

agent.interrupt.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent interrupt`.

agent.invoke.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent invoke`.

agent.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent list`.

agent.new.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent new`.

agent.oplog.description: One document emitted per oplog entry by `golem agent oplog` in structured formats. Parse stdout as a sequence of documents, not as one array or object.

agent.plugin-toggle.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent plugin-toggle`.

agent.redeploy.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent redeploy`.

agent.resume.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent resume`.

agent.revert.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent revert`.

agent.simulate-crash.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent simulate-crash`.

agent.stream.description: One document emitted per stream event by `golem agent stream` in structured formats. Parse stdout as a sequence of documents, not as one array or object.

agent.update.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem agent update`.

api-token.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api-token delete`.

api-token.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api-token list`.

api-token.new.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api-token new`.

api.deployment.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api deployment get`.

api.deployment.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api deployment list`.

api.domain.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api domain delete`.

api.domain.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api domain list`.

api.domain.register.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api domain register`.

api.security-scheme.create.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api security-scheme create`.

api.security-scheme.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api security-scheme delete`.

api.security-scheme.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api security-scheme get`.

api.security-scheme.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api security-scheme list`.

api.security-scheme.update.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem api security-scheme update`.

build.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem build`.

clean.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem clean`.

deploy.plan.description: May be emitted by `golem deploy` when planning includes deployment or environment setup changes. Other deploy output documents may also appear in the same command run.

deploy.description: Final success document emitted by `golem deploy` after planning, staging, deployment, or rollback completes. Earlier deploy output documents may also appear in the same command run.

generate-bridge.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem generate-bridge`.

new.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem new`.

templates.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem templates`.

component.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem component get`.

component.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem component list`.

component.manifest-trace.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem component manifest-trace`.

PolymorphicCardPermissionPattern.description: Rendered form of a card permission entry

deploy.deployment.description: May be emitted by `golem deploy` when a deployment or rollback creates a new current deployment revision. Other deploy output documents may also appear in the same command run.

deploy.diff.description: May be emitted by `golem deploy` when planning includes staging-area deployment differences. Other deploy output documents may also appear in the same command run.

deploy.deployments.description: May be emitted by `golem deploy` when listing candidate deployments, for example after an ambiguous version selection. Other deploy output documents may also appear in the same command run.

environment.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem environment list`.

environment.sync-deployment-options.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem environment sync-deployment-options`.

deploy.environment-setup-plan.description: May be emitted by `golem deploy` when planning environment setup entries. Other deploy output documents may also appear in the same command run.

plugin.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem plugin get`.

plugin.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem plugin list`.

plugin.register.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem plugin register`.

plugin.unregister.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem plugin unregister`.

profile.config.set-format.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem profile config set-format`.

profile.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem profile delete`.

profile.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem profile get`.

profile.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem profile list`.

profile.new.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem profile new`.

profile.switch.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem profile switch`.

resource.create.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem resource create`.

resource.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem resource delete`.

resource.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem resource get`.

resource.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem resource list`.

resource.update.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem resource update`.

retry-policy.create.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem retry-policy create`.

retry-policy.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem retry-policy delete`.

retry-policy.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem retry-policy get`.

retry-policy.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem retry-policy list`.

retry-policy.update.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem retry-policy update`.

secret.create.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem secret create`.

secret.delete.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem secret delete`.

secret.get.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem secret get`.

secret.list.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem secret list`.

secret.update-value.description: Single structured output document emitted by `golem secret update-value`.
